qa_pairs.question: Which browsers have a market share exactly equal to 1.2?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
WHERE browser.market_share = 1.2
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which browser entities with market share equal to '1.2'?

qa_pairs.question: Which browsers named Firefox have a market share of at most 18.11 and are compatible with an accelerator?

SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE browser.name = 'Firefox' AND browser.market_share <= 18.11
